name: calcium d-glucarate
summary: calcium d-glucarate is tracked for Inhibits beta-glucuronidase affecting detoxification pathways with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.

dosage: Adult RDA generally 1000–1200 mg/day total calcium from diet + supplements; adult UL 2000–2500 mg/day by age
